title: Jesus Loves Me, This I Know

verses.text: Jesus loves me, this I know, he loved children long ago. In his arms for all to see, saying, "Let them come to me.“ Yes, Jesus loves me! Yes, Jesus loves me! Yes, Jesus loves me! The Bible tells me so.

Jesus loves me, he will stay close beside me all the way; he's prepared a home for me, and someday his face I'll see. Yes, Jesus loves me! Yes, Jesus loves me! Yes, Jesus loves me! The Bible tells me so.

Jesus loves me, loves me still, though I'm very weak and ill; from his shining throne on high comes to watch me where I lie. Yes, Jesus loves me! Yes, Jesus loves me! Yes, Jesus loves me! The Bible tells me so.
Jesus loves me, he who died, heaven's gates to open wide; he will wash away my sin, let his little child come in. Yes, Jesus loves me! Yes, Jesus loves me! Yes, Jesus loves me! The Bible tells me so.
